# viettelidc_ovpc_route_table (Data Source)

Look up a ViettelIDC Route Table by id or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_route_table" "main" {
  name   = "main-rt"
  vpc_id = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Route Table ID. Mutually optional with name.
- `name` (String) Route Table name. Mutually optional with id.
- `vpc_id` (String)
